A

accountCard - Variable in class com.example.androidexample.AdminActivity
CardView component for the accounts

Container for the account cards

The name for said account card.

Activate button
activateDeacButton - Variable in class com.example.androidexample.AdminActivity
Button for the activate and deactivate account button
activateDeacContainer - Variable in class com.example.androidexample.AdminActivity
Container for the activate and deactivate account button

Handler for PUT /admin/users/{targetId}/activate OR /deactivate

Adds a card to the user's binder

Adds a request to the request queue for execution.
admin - Variable in class com.example.androidexample.AdminActivity
value for if the useris an admin or not
